en-US.title: Etapa - AI Cycling Coach
en-US.subtitle: Personalised training plans
en-US.description:
Train smarter with an AI coach that builds a personalised cycling plan around your life.

Set your goal — whether it's a gran fondo, sportive, or your first century ride — and Etapa creates a structured, periodised training plan tailored to your fitness level, schedule, and available days.

KEY FEATURES

• AI-Generated Training Plans — Get a fully structured plan with base, build, peak, and taper phases, complete with recovery weeks. Every session has a purpose.

• 6 AI Coach Personas — Choose from six distinct European coaching personalities: warm and encouraging, no-nonsense and direct, science-backed, chill but focused, race-day strategist, or casual riding buddy. Switch any time.

• Smart Coaching Chat — Ask your coach to adjust sessions, explain the training science, swap days, or rework your week. The AI understands your full plan and adapts accordingly.

• Detailed Ride Instructions — Each session includes distance, duration, effort level, zone targets, and practical tips on hydration, fueling, and pacing.

• Flexible Scheduling — Set how many rides per week, pick your days, and choose your plan length (4–16 weeks). Plans fit around your life, not the other way around.

• Weekly Progress Tracking — See completed sessions, weekly volume, and overall plan progress at a glance.

• Strava Integration — Connect Strava to automatically sync your rides and track completed training.

WHO IS ETAPA FOR?

Etapa is for cyclists of all levels — from beginners preparing for their first event to experienced riders training for a specific race. If you want a structured plan without the cost of a human coach, Etapa is for you.

HOW IT WORKS

1. Tell us about your goal (event, distance, date)
2. Set your fitness level and weekly availability
3. Pick your coach
4. Get your AI-generated plan in seconds
5. Train, track, and chat with your coach along the way

Start training for your next event today.
en-US.promotionalText: Train for your next cycling event with an AI coach that builds a personalised plan around your life.
en-US.releaseNotes: Initial release of Etapa — your AI-powered cycling coach. Set a goal, pick a coach, and get a fully structured training plan in seconds.

review.notes: The app requires an account to use. You can create one with any email address on the sign-in screen. Once signed in, tap '+ New Plan' to create a training plan — this is the core flow. You can also explore the AI coaching chat from any plan's week view.
